title: Industrial Plant Mobilization
scope: Strategic mobilization of heavy equipment for a major industrial plant shutdown.
challenge: Coordinating 40+ units within a strict 48-hour mobilization window.

title: Cross-Border Industrial Logistics
scope: Transporting oversized industrial components across GCC borders.
challenge: Managing complex multi-border permits and oversized cargo engineering.

title: Port-to-Site Heavy Cargo Project
scope: Handling and transporting critical machinery from Jubail Port to site.
challenge: Navigating high-traffic port limits under strict safety protocols.

title: Oil Rig Equipment Mobilization
scope: Comprehensive transport and positioning of heavy oil rig components.
equipment: Multi-axle lowbeds, heavy haulage tractors, 250T mobile cranes
challenge: Navigating remote, sandy off-road rig sites with high-tonnage cargo.

title: SABIC Plant Shutdown Expansion
scope: Full-scale logistics mobilization and heavy lifts for mechanical turnaround.
equipment: TUV certified boom trucks, flatbeds, rigging supervisor support
challenge: Coordinating complex high-hazard lifts within active plant zones under zero LTI protocols.

title: Saudi Aramco Pipeline Logistics
scope: Long-distance transport of thousands of tons of high-grade steel pipes.
equipment: Extendable flatbed trailers, escort vehicles, logistics coordinators
challenge: Maintaining secure continuous logistics pipelines over 800km of highway routes.
